'''âz-l-h''' ('''zalaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadruplicate|quadruplicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadruplicate|quadruplicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-h
|-
! Lemma
| zalaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalahithi|zalahithi]] || [[word:zalahiji|zalahiji]] || [[word:zalahishi|zalahishi]] || [[word:zalahi|zalahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalahuthuth|zalahuthuth]] || [[word:zalahujuj|zalahujuj]] || [[word:zalahushush|zalahushush]] || [[word:zalah|zalah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalahuthu|zalahuthu]] || [[word:zalahuju|zalahuju]] || [[word:zalahushu|zalahushu]] || [[word:zalahu|zalahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalahufuth|zalahufuth]] || [[word:zalahufuj|zalahufuj]] || [[word:zalahufush|zalahufush]] || [[word:zalahuf|zalahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalahethe|zalahethe]] || [[word:zalaheje|zalaheje]] || [[word:zalaheshe|zalaheshe]] || [[word:zalahe|zalahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalahothoth|zalahothoth]] || [[word:zalahojoj|zalahojoj]] || [[word:zalahoshosh|zalahoshosh]] || [[word:zalah|zalah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalahotho|zalahotho]] || [[word:zalahojo|zalahojo]] || [[word:zalahosho|zalahosho]] || [[word:zalaho|zalaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalahofoth|zalahofoth]] || [[word:zalahofoj|zalahofoj]] || [[word:zalahofosh|zalahofosh]] || [[word:zalahof|zalahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalahĂŠthĂŠ|zalahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zalahĂŠjĂŠ|zalahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zalahĂŠshĂŠ|zalahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zalahĂŠ|zalahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalahathath|zalahathath]] || [[word:zalahajaj|zalahajaj]] || [[word:zalahashash|zalahashash]] || [[word:zalah|zalah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalahatha|zalahatha]] || [[word:zalahaja|zalahaja]] || [[word:zalahasha|zalahasha]] || [[word:zalaha|zalaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalahafath|zalahafath]] || [[word:zalahafaj|zalahafaj]] || [[word:zalahafash|zalahafash]] || [[word:zalahaf|zalahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zalahasha|zalahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozalahasha|gozalahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizalahasha|gokizalahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zalahnĂŒsha|zalahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozalahnknĂŒsha|gozalahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizalahnĂŒsha|gokizalahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zalahshĂ«sha|zalahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozalahnkshĂ«sha|gozalahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizalahshĂ«sha|gokizalahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalahrosha|zalahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalahnkrosha|gozalahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalahrosha|gokizalahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zalahmusha|zalahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalahnkmusha|gozalahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalahmusha|gokizalahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zalahsherasha|zalahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozalahnksherasha|gozalahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizalahsherasha|gokizalahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zalahngasha|zalahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozalahnkngasha|gozalahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizalahngasha|gokizalahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zalahyasha|zalahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozalahnkyasha|gozalahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizalahyasha|gokizalahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zalahyamasha|zalahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozalahnkyamasha|gozalahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizalahyamasha|gokizalahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalahnĂŒshĂ«sha|zalahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozalahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizalahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalahnĂŒrosha|zalahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalahnknĂŒrosha|gozalahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalahnĂŒrosha|gokizalahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalahnĂŒmusha|zalahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalahnknĂŒmusha|gozalahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalahnĂŒmusha|gokizalahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalahshĂ«nĂŒsha|zalahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozalahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizalahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalahshĂ«rosha|zalahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalahnkshĂ«rosha|gozalahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalahshĂ«rosha|gokizalahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalahshĂ«musha|zalahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalahnkshĂ«musha|gozalahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalahshĂ«musha|gokizalahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalahronĂŒsha|zalahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalahnkronĂŒsha|gozalahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalahronĂŒsha|gokizalahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalahroshĂ«sha|zalahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalahnkroshĂ«sha|gozalahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalahroshĂ«sha|gokizalahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalahromusha|zalahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalahnkromusha|gozalahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalahromusha|gokizalahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalahmunĂŒsha|zalahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalahnkmunĂŒsha|gozalahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalahmunĂŒsha|gokizalahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalahmushĂ«sha|zalahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalahnkmushĂ«sha|gozalahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalahmushĂ«sha|gokizalahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalahmurosha|zalahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalahnkmurosha|gozalahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalahmurosha|gokizalahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zalah|zalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠlĂŠh|zĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozalah|hozalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠlĂŠh|hozĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozalah|hohozalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠlĂŠh|hohozĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzalah|nĂŒzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠh|nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzalah|nĂŒnĂŒzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzalah|nĂŻzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠh|nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzalah|nĂŻnĂŻzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzalah|luzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠlĂŠh|luzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzalah|luluzalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠlĂŠh|luluzĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizalah|lizalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠlĂŠh|lizĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizalah|lilizalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠlĂŠh|lilizĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozalah|kozalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠlĂŠh|kozĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozalah|kokozalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠlĂŠh|kokozĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezalah|kezalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠlĂŠh|kezĂŠlĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezalah|kekezalah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠlĂŠh|kekezĂŠlĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
